title: Electric utility applicability
doc_html:
§1260.  Electric utility applicability

An assignee or financing party shall not be considered an electric utility or person providing electric service by virtue of engaging in the transactions described in this Part.

Acts 2010, No. 988, §2, eff. July 6, 2010.
doc_text:
§1260.  Electric utility applicability
An assignee or financing party shall not be considered an electric utility or person providing electric service by virtue of engaging in the transactions described in this Part.
Acts 2010, No. 988, §2, eff. July 6, 2010.
